headline: All You Need to Know About Truist Financial (TFC) Rating Upgrade to Buy
summary: Truist Financial (TFC) has been upgraded to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), reflecting growing optimism about the company's earnings prospects. This might drive the stock higher in the near term.

headline: Is The Short Term Pessimism In Fiserv (FISV) A Buying Opportunity Near Its 52-Week Low
summary: Fiserv Inc. (NASDAQ:FISV) is one of the 10 Best 52-Week Low Technology Stocks to Buy According to Analysts.
